title: Enchantment Extraction Table Mod By Semi
description: Lets player extract enchantment books from items they desire.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Cw60GW5kgKk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



-     Players can extract the enchantments from the item by clicking to the Enchantment Extraction Table with the enchanted item they desire.
-     This action consumes 1 lapis and 1 regular book per enchantment. If player doesnt have enough lapis or book in their inventory enchantment cannot be extracted;

> (If the book and lapis count in players inventory doesnt match the enchantment count on the item when extraction started, table will continue to extract until lapis or book runs out.)

> (There is a hidden priority list inside the table. Forexample, Mending will always get extracted first.)
-      Extracted enchantments comes back to player in their book forms.

 

- Enchantment&Curse **(1.0.3)** Extraction Table only extracts vanilla enchantments !
- Table will try to extract all enchantments from The Item at once if possible.
- Enchantment Extraction Table cannot remove curses from items, for curses you will need Curse Extraction table **(1.0.3)**
- Extracting a enchantment from item will not reset its enchantment cost.

 

 

_This was a mod for our modded smp. And i decided to make it public, nothing ground breaking but it sure is useful if you are looking for something like this._

_English and Turkish Translation are available._

 

_#2/3_
